entity.label: Mehetabel
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: Wife of Hadad, one of the kings of Edom (Gen. 36:39).

nodes.label: Mehetabel
nodes.description: Wife of Hadad, one of the kings of Edom (Gen. 36:39).

nodes.label: Hadad
nodes.description:
One of the Edomitish kings (Gen. 36:39) about the time of Saul. Called also Hadad (1 Chr. 1:50, 51).

It is probable that in these cases Hadar may be an error simply of transcription for Hadad.

verses.text: And Baalhanan the son of Achbor died, and Hadar reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pau; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
And when Baalhanan was dead, Hadad reigned in his stead: and the name of his city was Pai; and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.
